FRONTIER-ABSOLUTE_ZERO_CARD.title: Absolute Zero
FRONTIER-ABSOLUTE_ZERO_CARD.description:
Remove all [gold]Heat[/gold] and [gold]Body Burn[/gold]. Gain Block equal to the [gold]Heat[/gold] removed.
Add 1 [gold]Cold Burn[/gold] to your discard pile.
FRONTIER-AGILE_SMELTING_CARD.title: Agile Smelting
FRONTIER-AGILE_SMELTING_CARD.description: After combat, enchant {NimbleStacks:diff()} card(s) in your deck with [gold]Nimble[/gold] [gold]Enchant[/gold].
FRONTIER-ANVIL_ECHO_CARD.title: Anvil Echo
FRONTIER-ANVIL_ECHO_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
At upgrade +10, transforms into [gold]Anvil Memory[/gold].
FRONTIER-ANVIL_MEMORY_CARD.title: Anvil Memory
FRONTIER-ANVIL_MEMORY_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Hits:diff()} times.
Only obtained when [gold]Anvil Echo[/gold] reaches its masterpiece (+10).
FRONTIER-APPROACHING_DREAD_CARD.title: Approaching Dread
FRONTIER-APPROACHING_DREAD_CARD.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {StrMult:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] per {HeatChunk:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold]; lose that [gold]Strength[/gold] at end of turn.
FRONTIER-BELLOWS_CARD.title: Bellows
FRONTIER-BLAST_FURNACE_CARD.title: Blast Furnace
FRONTIER-BLAST_FURNACE_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand, gain {HeatPerTurn:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] and
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {ExhaustCount:diff()} card(s) from your hand.
FRONTIER-BURNING_STRIKE_CARD.title: Burning Strike
FRONTIER-COLD_BURN_STATUS_CARD.title: Cold Burn Status
FRONTIER-COLD_BURN_STATUS_CARD.descripti:
Unplayable.
At the end of your turn, if this is in your hand, lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
FRONTIER-COLD_GESTURE_CARD.title: Cold Gesture
FRONTIER-COLD_HEART_CARD.title: Cold Heart
FRONTIER-COOLING_STRIKE_CARD.title: Cooling Strike
FRONTIER-COOLING_SYSTEM_CARD.title: Cooling System
FRONTIER-CRUSHING_HAMMER_CARD.title: Crushing Hammer
FRONTIER-CRUSHING_HAMMER_CARD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove all of the target's Block, then gain {HeatGain:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-DEFEND_SHUMIT_CARD.title: Defend
FRONTIER-DESIGN_COMPLETION_CARD.title: Design Completion
FRONTIER-DESIGN_COMPLETION_CARD.descript:
Choose {PickCount:diff()} card(s) from your draw pile, upgrade them, and add them to your hand.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
FRONTIER-DOUBLE_TAP_CARD.title: Double Tap
FRONTIER-ECHO_SMELTING_CARD.title: Echo Smelting
FRONTIER-ECHO_SMELTING_CARD.description: After combat, enchant {SpiralStacks:diff()} card(s) in your deck with [gold]Spiral[/gold] [gold]Enchant[/gold].
FRONTIER-EXHAUST_SYSTEM_CARD.title: Exhaust System
FRONTIER-EXHAUST_SYSTEM_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, if you have at least {HeatThreshold:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold],
lose 10 [gold]Heat[/gold] and draw 1 card.
FRONTIER-FAULT_BREAK_CARD.title: Fault Break
FRONTIER-FAULT_BREAK_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If a target had Block, deal double damage and remove their remaining Block.
FRONTIER-FEARLESS_OF_FLAME_CARD.title: Fearless Of Flame
FRONTIER-FIRE_POWER_PLANT_CARD.title: Fire Power Plant
FRONTIER-FIRE_POWER_PLANT_CARD.descripti:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your hand.
If it was [gold]Burn[/gold], gain {EnergyOnBurn:energyIcons()}.
FRONTIER-FLAME_ARMOR_CARD.title: Flame Armor
FRONTIER-FLAME_ARMOR_CARD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Whenever a [gold]Burn[/gold] is created, gain {BlockOnBurn:diff()} Block.
FRONTIER-FLAME_PULSE_CARD.title: Flame Pulse
FRONTIER-FLAME_PULSE_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Heat:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-FLAME_SMASH_CARD.title: Flame Smash
FRONTIER-FLAME_STRIKE_CARD.title: Flame Strike
FRONTIER-FOLDED_STEEL_CARD.title: Folded Steel
FRONTIER-FOLDED_STEEL_CARD.description:
Can only be played if you have at least {HeatReq:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
The next {Replays:diff()} upgraded card(s) you play this turn activate an additional time.
FRONTIER-FORGE_BLUEPRINT_CARD.title: Forge Blueprint
FRONTIER-FORGE_BLUEPRINT_CARD.descriptio:
Can only be played if you have upgraded cards at least 5 times this combat.
Choose [gold]Forge[/gold] or [gold]Blast Furnace[/gold] to add to your hand.
FRONTIER-FORGE_CARD.title: Forge
FRONTIER-FORGE_CARD.description:
Draw 1 fewer card each turn.
At the start of your turn, upgrade a random upgradable card in your hand {UpgradesPerTurn:diff()} time(s) this combat.
([gold]Forge[/gold] and [gold]Great Forge[/gold] cannot be chosen.)
FRONTIER-FORGE_FACILITY_BLUEPRINT_CARD.d:
Can only be played if you have upgraded cards at least 5 times this combat.
Choose [gold]Grinding Room[/gold] or [gold]Smelter[/gold] to add to your hand.
FRONTIER-FORGING_CARD.title: Forging
FRONTIER-FORGING_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {HeatGain:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold], then upgrade 1 card in your hand this combat.
FRONTIER-FURNACE_MAINTENANCE_CARD.title: Furnace Maintenance
FRONTIER-FURNACE_MAINTENANCE_CARD.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block and {HeatGain:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
If a [gold]Burn[/gold] was [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn, gain {FurnaceBonusEnergy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
FRONTIER-GREAT_FORGE_CARD.title: Great Forge
FRONTIER-GREAT_FORGE_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand,
randomly upgrade an upgradable card in your hand {UpgradesPerTurn:diff()} time(s) this combat.
([gold]Forge[/gold] and [gold]Great Forge[/gold] cannot be chosen.)
FRONTIER-GRINDING_ROOM_CARD.title: Grinding Room
FRONTIER-GRINDING_ROOM_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand, draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
This turn, Energy you gain is reduced by {GrindingEnergyPenalty:energyIcons()}.
FRONTIER-HAMMER_DOWN_CARD.title: Hammer Down
FRONTIER-HEART_OF_FLAME_CARD.title: Heart Of Flame
FRONTIER-HEART_OF_FLAME_CARD.description:
Prepare immunity to [gold]Burn[/gold] and [gold]Body Burn[/gold].
(Currently only the immunity flag is applied.)
FRONTIER-HEAT_CYCLE_CARD.title: Heat Cycle
FRONTIER-HEAT_CYCLE_CARD.description:
Draw 1 card (2 if upgraded).
After drawing, if you have less than 70 [gold]Heat[/gold], gain {HeatMove:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold]; otherwise lose {HeatMove:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-HEATED_FORGE_CARD.title: Heated Forge
FRONTIER-HEATED_HAMMER_CARD.title: Heated Hammer
FRONTIER-HEATED_HAMMER_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Additionally, for each 10 [gold]Heat[/gold], deal {HeatStep:diff()} bonus damage.
FRONTIER-HEATED_SHIELD_CARD.title: Heated Shield
FRONTIER-HEAT_EXCHANGE_CARD.title: Heat Exchange
FRONTIER-HEAT_EXCHANGE_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose 1 card in your hand: move it to the top of your draw pile, upgrade it, then lose {HeatLoss:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-HEAT_EXCHANGE_CARD.selectionScr: Choose a card to place on top of your Draw Pile and Upgrade.
FRONTIER-HEATING_CARD.title: Heating
FRONTIER-HEATING_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If your [gold]Heat[/gold] is 0, this costs 0 this turn and draw {DrawWhenHeatZero:diff()} card(s).
Then gain {HeatGain} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-IMPURITY_COMPRESSION_CARD.title: Impurity Compression
FRONTIER-IMPURITY_COMPRESSION_CARD.descr:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] every [gold]Burn[/gold] in your draw pile.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, plus {PerBurn:diff()} for each [gold]Burn[/gold] [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this way.
Gain {HeatGain:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-IMPURITY_REMOVAL_CARD.title: Impurity Removal
FRONTIER-IMPURITY_REMOVAL_CARD.descripti:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] {BurnExhaustTimes:diff()} [gold]Burn[/gold] card(s) from your discard pile or hand.
FRONTIER-IRON_ARMOR_CARD.title: Iron Armor
FRONTIER-IRON_SHIELD_CARD.title: Iron Shield
FRONTIER-IRON_SWORD_CARD.title: Iron Sword
FRONTIER-MANUFACTURE_CARD.title: Manufacture
FRONTIER-MANUFACTURE_CARD.description:
Can only be played if you have a [gold]Forge[/gold] in your hand.
Add {CreateCount:diff()} random [gold]Iron Sword[/gold], [gold]Iron Armor[/gold], or [gold]Iron Shield[/gold] card(s) to your hand.
FRONTIER-MASTERPIECE_HAMMER_CARD.title: Masterpiece Hammer
FRONTIER-MASTER_PRIDE_CARD.title: Master Pride
FRONTIER-MASTER_PRIDE_CARD.description:
Upgrade every upgradable card in your hand and draw pile.
If your [gold]Heat[/gold] is at or below 50, raise it to 50.
FRONTIER-MASTERY_SMELTING_CARD.title: Mastery Smelting
FRONTIER-MASTERY_SMELTING_CARD.descripti: After combat, enchant {AdroitStacks:diff()} card(s) in your deck with [gold]Adroit[/gold] [gold]Enchant[/gold].
FRONTIER-MATERIAL_GATHER_CARD.title: Material Gather
FRONTIER-MATERIAL_GATHER_CARD.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
Draw 1 card (2 if Upgraded).
FRONTIER-MELT_CARD.title: Melt
FRONTIER-MELT_CARD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your hand and gain 20 [gold]Heat[/gold].
Requires a [gold]Forge[/gold] or [gold]Blast Furnace[/gold] in your hand.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
FRONTIER-MELTING_CARD.title: Melting
FRONTIER-MELTING_CARD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your hand and draw 2 cards (3 if upgraded).
Requires a [gold]Forge[/gold] or [gold]Blast Furnace[/gold] in your hand, or at least 100 [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-METAL_LIQUEFACTION_CARD.title: Metal Liquefaction
FRONTIER-METAL_LIQUEFACTION_CARD.descrip:
Choose 1 upgraded [gold]Attack[/gold] in your hand. It costs 0 this turn until played.
Whenever you play an upgraded [gold]Attack[/gold] this turn, gain {BonusHeat:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
Shuffle 2 [gold]Burn[/gold] cards into your draw pile.
FRONTIER-NOT_THIS_ONE_CARD.title: Not This One!
FRONTIER-NOT_THIS_ONE_CARD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card from your hand.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {EnergyGain:energyIcons()}.
FRONTIER-OIL_COOLING_CARD.title: Oil Cooling
FRONTIER-REFINING_CARD.title: Refining
FRONTIER-REFINING_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills an enemy, [gold]upgrade[/gold] this card permanently.
FRONTIER-REUSE_AESTHETICS_CARD.title: Reuse Aesthetics
FRONTIER-REUSE_AESTHETICS_CARD.descripti: Draw 1 card for each [gold]Burn[/gold] you [gold]Exhausted[/gold] this turn.
FRONTIER-SHARP_SMELTING_CARD.title: Sharp Smelting
FRONTIER-SHARP_SMELTING_CARD.description: After combat, enchant {SharpStacks:diff()} card(s) in your deck with [gold]Sharp[/gold] [gold]Enchant[/gold].
FRONTIER-SMELTER_CARD.title: Smelter
FRONTIER-SMELTER_CARD.description:
At the start of your turn, if this is in your hand, lose 15 [gold]Heat[/gold] and
upgrade 1 random card in your hand this combat.
FRONTIER-SMELTING_DESIGN_CARD.title: Smelting Design
FRONTIER-SMELTING_DESIGN_CARD.descriptio:
Draw 1 card.
Your next [gold]Attack[/gold] this turn applies {NextAttackHeat:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-SMELTING_STRIKE_CARD.title: Smelting Strike
FRONTIER-SMELTING_STRIKE_CARD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Upgrade {HandUpgrades:diff()} random upgradable card(s) in your hand.
Gain {HeatGain:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-SPARK_BURST_CARD.title: Spark Burst
FRONTIER-SPARK_BURST_CARD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Gain {Heat} [gold]Heat[/gold].
[gold]Reforge[/gold] {ReforgeLeft}.
FRONTIER-STEAM_RELEASE_CARD.title: Steam Release
FRONTIER-STEAM_RELEASE_CARD.description: If you lost [gold]Heat[/gold] during your turn, before turn end deal {VentDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
FRONTIER-STRIKE_SHUMIT_CARD.title: Strike
FRONTIER-STURDY_ARMOR_CARD.title: Sturdy Armor
FRONTIER-TAP_CARD.title: Tap
FRONTIER-TEMPORARY_QUENCHING_CARD.title: Temporary Quenching
Gain {ThermalEnergyPer:energyIcons()} for every {HeatPerEnergy:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold] you have,
remove all [gold]Heat[/gold], then draw {X:diff()} cards.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold].
FRONTIER-TONGS_CARD.title: Tongs
FRONTIER-TONGS_CARD.description:
Upgrade 1 card in your hand.
Gain {HeatCharge:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-UNBURNING_BODY_CARD.title: Unburning Body
FRONTIER-UNBURNING_BODY_CARD.description:
Gain Block.
Add a [gold]Burn[/gold] to your discard pile.
(Effect not yet implemented in code.)
FRONTIER-UNSTOPPABLE_HEAT_CARD.title: Unstoppable Heat
FRONTIER-UNSTOPPABLE_HEAT_CARD.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Damage increases by 1 for each {HeatDivisor:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
FRONTIER-UNTIL_EXHAUSTION_CARD.title: Until Exhaustion
FRONTIER-UNTIL_EXHAUSTION_CARD.descripti:
{X:diff()} times: deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy, upgrade 1 random upgradable card in your hand, and gain {HeatPer:diff()} [gold]Heat[/gold].
Then end your turn.
FRONTIER-WATER_COOLING_CARD.title: Water Cooling
